Protected Attributes inherited from llvm::DIDescriptor
const MDNode * DbgNode

Detailed Description

A simple derived type.

Like a const qualified type, a typedef, a pointer or reference, et cetera. Or, a data member of a class/struct/union.

Definition at line 468 of file DebugInfo.h.
